summary: Matched the lb/code_8000B074 translation unit by replacing the 2334-line assembly file with a 1019-line C implementation and wiring it into the build. The PR body characterizes the file as generic utility functions mainly operating on HSD types. The new C covers JObj animation-state traversal, JObj transform copying and world/local vector conversion, DObj/MObj/TObj/PObj animation rate/request helpers, animation lookup utilities, RObj constraint helpers, TEV/TExp register allocation helpers, LObj filtering, and DObj attachment helpers. It also added supporting prototypes and structure definitions in HSD headers, converted several stage callbacks to use HSD_JObj* instead of raw u8*, and refined Fighter attributes by replacing three s32 fields with a Vec3.
what_changed: Deleted asm/melee/lb/code_8000B074.s and replaced it with src/melee/lb/code_8000B074.c, then changed obj_files.mk to build src/melee/lb/code_8000B074.c.o instead of the assembly object.

Added src/melee/lb/code_8000B074.h with prototypes for the newly decompiled functions from func_8000B074 through func_8000CE40, including helpers for HSD_JObj, HSD_DObj, HSD_RObj, HSD_TExp, and HSD_LObj.

Implemented JObj animation checks: func_8000B074 checks a single JObj AObj for animation, func_8000B09C walks a JObj tree looking for an animated AObj, and func_8000B134 walks similarly looking for AOBJ_REWINDED.

Implemented func_8000B1CC as a JObj/vector transform helper that handles null JObj, parented JObjs via HSD_JObjSetupMatrix and PSMTXMUltiVec, and root JObjs through translation/rotation/scale fast paths.

Implemented multiple JObj transform setters from HSD_Joint data: func_8000B4FC, func_8000B5DC, func_8000B6A4, func_8000B760, and recursive func_8000B804, using HSD_JObjClearFlags, HSD_JObjSetMtxDirty, and MTX_DIRTY/USE_QUATERNION flags.
Implemented DObj animation helpers func_8000BA44 and func_8000BB24, annotated in comments as lbDObjSetRateAll and lbDObjReqAnimAll, iterating through PObj, MObj, and TObj animation objects.
Implemented lookup helpers for JObj and AnimJoint animation timing, including commented names lbGetJObjFramerate, lbGetJObjCurrFrame, and lbGetJObjEndFrame.

Added animation attachment helper func_8000C07C that selects AnimJoint, MatAnimJoint, and ShapeAnimJoint arrays by index and calls HSD_JObjAddAnimAll; func_8000C0E8 wraps this around an UnkAnimContainer.

Implemented RObj constraint utilities that allocate RObjs, set flags such as 0x90000001/0x90000002/0x90000004, attach constraint JObjs, remove REFTYPE_JOBJ constraints, and add limit RObjs with 0xA0000000 flags.
Kept at least two difficult functions as inline asm in the C file: func_8000C490 and func_8000C868, preserving matching while still moving the file out of standalone assembly.
Added TEV/TExp support structures HSD_TevConf, HSD_TevDesc, and HSD_TExpTevDesc to src/sysdolphin/baselib/texp.h for the free color/alpha register helpers.

Added or improved HSD prototypes: func_8000B1CC now takes struct _HSD_JObj*, Vec*, Vec*; HSD_JObjAddAnimAll has a full typed prototype; func_8037EE0C and func_8037EF28 gained Vec/Quaternion prototypes; HSD_RObjAlloc was declared.
Added HSD_JObjGetFlags and inline HSD_JObjGetRObj to jobj.h, and added an assert_line for the output parameter in HSD_JObjGetTranslation.
Changed stage callback signatures and users in grshrine, grstory, and stage.h from raw u8* joint parameters to struct _HSD_JObj* joint parameters, matching func_8000B1CC's typed JObj use.
Updated Fighter.x110_attr at offset 0x280 from three separate s32 fields to Vec3 x280.
smart_moves: The assembly was not replaced with a monolithic blind C dump; the implementation introduced typed HSD_JObj, HSD_Joint, HSD_DObj, HSD_RObj, HSD_TExp, and related baselib types so the file became useful to later decompilation work.
For hard-to-match transform interpolation areas, the PR used inline asm functions inside the C file rather than blocking the entire translation-unit match on the hardest routines.
Tree-walking logic for JObj children, siblings, parents, and INSTANCE flags was expressed in C while preserving the control flow needed for a match.

The transform helper func_8000B1CC used fast paths for null input vectors and identity root transforms before falling back to matrix setup and PSMTXMUltiVec, mirroring the assembly behavior and avoiding unnecessary matrix work.
The PR improved downstream type correctness by updating stage callback signatures to HSD_JObj* and a Fighter Vec3 field, reducing future casts and raw pointer ambiguity.
Adding HSD_TevDesc/HSD_TevConf in texp.h made the TEV register-allocation code readable instead of relying on raw offsets.
The build-system switch was clean: obj_files.mk moved from asm/melee/lb/code_8000B074.s.o to src/melee/lb/code_8000B074.c.o, and e_files.mk added the epilogue object.
decomp_lessons: When a previously unknown file mostly manipulates HSD objects, invest in baselib headers and typed prototypes first; this PR shows that proper HSD_JObj, HSD_RObj, HSD_TExp, and Vec typing can unlock a large utility file.

It is acceptable and useful to migrate a whole assembly translation unit to C even if one or two difficult functions remain inline asm, provided the object still matches and the rest of the file becomes typed C.
Updating callers and callback typedefs at the same time as a utility-function signature prevents type mismatches from spreading through stage and fighter code.

Repeated assembly patterns often correspond to generic hierarchy traversal; in this slice, JObj child/next/parent traversal appears in the animation-state checks and was represented once in readable C idioms.

Use comments for suspected library names when evidence exists but symbols are still address-style, as seen with lbDObjSetRateAll, lbDObjReqAnimAll, lbGetJObjFramerate, lbGetJObjCurrFrame, lbGetJObjEndFrame, lbGetFreeColorRegister, and lbGetFreeAlphaRegister.
Header work can be part of matching work: adding asserts and small inline accessors such as HSD_JObjGetRObj can be necessary to match baselib call patterns while making future code safer.
Do not over-name uncertain functions prematurely; most functions retained func_8000xxxx names, while only local comments documented likely semantic names.
naming_conventions: Address-based function names were retained for uncertain symbols, e.g. func_8000B074, func_8000B1CC, func_8000C390, and func_8000CE40.
Likely semantic names were recorded as comments rather than hard renames, e.g. lbDObjSetRateAll for func_8000BA44 and lbDObjReqAnimAll for func_8000BB24.
Local helper names used descriptive lb-prefixed names where evidence was clear enough, e.g. lbFindJObjWithAObj, lbGetFreeColorRegImpl, and lbGetFreeAlphaRegImpl.
Baselib types follow HSD_* naming: HSD_JObj, HSD_Joint, HSD_DObj, HSD_RObj, HSD_TevDesc, HSD_TExpTevDesc, HSD_AnimJoint, HSD_MatAnimJoint, and HSD_ShapeAnimJoint.
The new lb header uses the file-address name code_8000B074.h because the translation unit had not yet received a semantic module name.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Removed a full standalone assembly source file but retained inline asm for func_8000C490 and func_8000C868, indicating selective asm fallback for difficult regions.
Used explicit struct field accesses matching known offsets, such as JObj translate/rotate/scale/mtx/aobj/child/next/parent/flags fields, instead of raw pointer arithmetic.
Used small inline helpers such as jobj_parent and robj_next to shape codegen around null checks and field access.
Used direct struct assignment for Vec/Vec3 and HSD_Joint fields to reproduce grouped loads/stores from the assembly.

Preserved matrix and quaternion helper calls seen in assembly, including PSMTXMUltiVec, HSD_JObjSetupMatrix, HSD_JObjGetTranslation, HSD_JObjGetRotation, HSD_JObjGetScale, func_8037EE0C, and func_8037EF28.

Modeled boolean bit tests with named flags where available, such as AOBJ_NO_ANIM, AOBJ_REWINDED, INSTANCE, USE_QUATERNION, and MTX_DIRTY, while some raw masks remained where names were not yet established.
Added required external prototypes in include/functions.h and baselib headers so calls in the matched C compiled with the intended types.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews were present in the provided PR slice, so there is no recorded reviewer feedback to extract.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that rename code_8000B074 or its func_8000xxxx symbols to semantic lb* names.
Search for later cleanups converting raw flag masks such as 0x2000000, 0x90000001, 0x90000002, 0x90000004, and 0xA0000000 into named HSD constants.
Check whether func_8000C490 and func_8000C868 were later fully decompiled from inline asm.
Look for subsequent PRs that expand HSD_TExp/HSD_TevDesc definitions or TEV register allocation helpers.
Search stage callback6 users after this PR to confirm HSD_JObj* became the stable callback signature.
